title: Immunohistochemistry of free floating slices
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6h8up","text":"This protocol details the immunohistochemistry of free floating slices.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Step 1 is for fresh tissue only, otherwise, start directly to step 2 Fix with paraformaldehyde (PFA) 4% Overnight at Room temperature . - 4 g of PFA - Dissolve in 100 mL de PBS (pH pH 7.3 ) previously heated to around 60 °C . - Mix the solution until it completely clears up. - Filter and store at 4 °C for a duration of 336:00:00 .

Permeabilize and block the non-specific primary antibodies bindings in a 24-well multiwell plateby incubating under agitation for 01:00:00 with 0.5 mL to 1 mL of a BSA enriched ab solution ( 10 mL of ab solution for 1 g of BSA).

All the subsequent steps are done using the following ab solution: - 95 mL of PBS pH 7.3 - 20 mg of NaN3 (final 0.02 %) - 300 µL of Triton X-100 (final 0.3 %) - 500 mg of BSA (final 0.5 %) - 5 mL of goat serum (final 5 %)
Dilute the primary antibodies in the ab solution and apply 0.5 mL per well (up to 10 slices) Overnight at Room temperature under agitation.
Rinse the slices with PBS (3X 10 min) under agitation.
Dilute the secondary antibodies in the ab solution and apply 0.5 mL per well (up to 10 slices) for 02:00:00 at Room temperature under agitation.
Rinse the slices with PBS (3X 10 min) under agitation.
Mount the slices on charged (+) glass slides submerged in PBS.
Let the mounted slices dry (about 00:10:00 ). *Don’t wait too long otherwise salt deposits will start to appear and affect your staining.
Seal the slides with 100 µL - 120 µL /slide of Fluoromount G and a rectangular glass coverslip and seal the coverslip to the slide with nail polish.
Rinse with PBS 1X (3X 10 min) under agitation.
Rinse with PBS 1X for 00:10:00 under agitation (1/3).
Rinse with PBS 1X for 00:10:00 under agitation (2/3).
Rinse with PBS 1X for 00:10:00 under agitation (3/3).
Rinse the slices with PBS for 00:10:00 under agitation (1/3).
Rinse the slices with PBS for 00:10:00 under agitation (2/3).
Rinse the slices with PBS for 00:10:00 under agitation (3/3).
Rinse the slices with PBS for 00:10:00 under agitation (1/3).
Rinse the slices with PBS for 00:10:00 under agitation (2/3).
Rinse the slices with PBS for 00:10:00 under agitation (3/3).
creator: Nicolas Giguère
